title: Introducing the new monday.com expert catalog!

posts.author: Etaysho (Etay Shoham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community, Etay from the Programs team here in monday.com. I wanted to tell you first about our new expert catalog!

We are building a platform to connect customers with top experts from all over the world.

Looking for help setting up your workflows, onboarding your team, creating integrations, or anything else to make sure your monday.com setup is right for your organization?

The monday.com expert catalog features some of the top experts, that you can hire today!
Check it out and let us know your thoughts!

monday Expert Catalog

monday.com Expert Catalog

Our certified experts are here to make sure you're getting the most out of monday.com. Build customized workflows, onboard your team, create integrations, transfer data, and so much more.

posts.author: WildcardInsights (Anne Schneider)
posts.cookedHtml: How do you become an expert to be added to this catalog?
